mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.expense_type AS expenseType, e.amount, e.expense_date AS expenseDate, e.description, e.receipt_path AS receiptPath, e.registered_by AS registeredBy, emp.name AS registeredByName, e.created_at AS createdAt FROM expenses e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.registered_by = u.id LEFT JOIN employees emp ON u.id = emp.id ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE expenses SET expense_type = #{expenseType}, amount = #{amount}, expense_date = #{expenseDate}, description = #{description}, receipt_path = #{receiptPath} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.employee_id AS employeeId, p.pay_year AS payYear, p.pay_month AS payMonth, p.work_hours AS workHours, p.base_pay AS basePay, p.deduction, p.net_pay AS netPay, p.paid_at AS paidAt, p.pay_type AS payType, p.note, p.created_at AS createdAt, e.name AS employeeName, e.emp_num AS employeeNo FROM payrolls p LEFT JOIN employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id ORDER BY p.pay_year DESC, p.pay_month DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE payrolls SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, pay_year = #{payYear}, pay_month = #{payMonth}, work_hours = #{workHours}, base_pay = #{basePay}, deduction = #{deduction}, net_pay = #{netPay}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, note = #{note}, pay_type = #{payType} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.emp_num, e.name, e.position, e.contract_type, e.is_active, e.hourly_wage, e.monthly_salary FROM employees e WHERE e.is_active = 1 ORDER BY e.position, e.name
